title: selenipedium × elsteadianum
intro: Selenipedium × elsteadianum is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium ishpingojense. This rare and unusual orchid is known for its unique, palmate leaves and delicate white flowers. However, limited information is available on the medicinal properties of Selenipedium × elsteadianum, but like other members of the Selenipedium genus, it may possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Unfortunately, there is no available information on specific health benefits or herbal preparations associated with this plant.
